codeReview.summary: Failed-login recording, progressive delay/lockout, and admin IP summary endpoint are implemented and covered by milestone integration tests. One reporting accuracy limitation exists but is non-blocking for milestone gate criteria.

issues.description: `GET /api/admin/users/failed-logins` applies `limit` to raw failed-login rows before grouping by IP. On noisy single-IP traffic, this can underrepresent other IPs in the summarized output and skew attempts/status visibility for operators.

summary: PASS with one non-blocking observation: failed-login aggregation limit is row-first, which can bias admin summary visibility under high-volume conditions.
